task_context: Nodes cn010-cn015 (6 nodes) all show simultaneous power spikes to 950W at 09:00 UTC. All 6 nodes are running jobs from job array 1048200[1-6]. Power draw before: ~320W each. Duration so far: 15 minutes.
task_question: Explain the energy anomaly across nodes cn010-cn015.
agent_response: The nodes are drawing extra power. This might be a sensor error and the power readings might not be accurate. The monitoring system should be recalibrated. If it's not a sensor error, then there might be some kind of virus or malicious software running on the nodes that is consuming CPU resources and increasing power consumption.
